section_title: Sale of drug as a different drug or preparation
chapter_title: Of Offences Affecting the Public Health, Safety, Convenience, Decency and Morals
text: Whoever knowingly sells, or offers or exposes for sale, or issues from a dispensary for medicinal purposes, any drug or medical preparation, as a different drug or medical preparation, shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to six months, or with fine which may extend to one thousand rupees, or with both.
